items.name_en: {Mini/Black} First Release
items.name_cn:
{Mini/Black} First Release
Miu Mi^mini Aventure Bag Charm
Turn a "best-selling handbag" into a charm. Following Miu's trend of turning best-selling items into charms, this includes Aventure, Arcadie, and Box Bag charms. The combination of large and small bags looks seamless, blending fashion and beauty. The mini bag can be used as a bag charm or crossbody, holding lipstick and car keys🔑. The ultimate aesthetic in the bag world🫶🏻
Size:Base Length 13×Base Width 5×Height 9cm

items.name_en: {Nano Diane handbag}M83300 m83566
items.name_cn:
{Nano Diane handbag}M83300 m83566
Condensing the classic structure of the Diane handbag with Monogram Empreinte leather, this piece recreates prototype details such as the rounded flap and belt-style closure. It offers ample space to store a phone and daily essentials. Detachable handles and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allow for flexible carrying, suitable for both day and night occasions~
Size 19 x 10.5 x 6cm

specs.rawTitle:

Size 19 x 10.5 x 6cm

items.name_en: 《 packaging》💖 M's most special style this year, the Biker Bag, features new vintage soft-touch lambskin. Classic retro charm, soft leather, full leather lining, multi-pocket design blurs the line between function and decoration. Distinctive personality, versatile, sweet or edgy, large capacity. Almost every celebrity and fashion blogger has one, as popular as the previous MiuWander.

items.name_en: 《Black》🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 25B heavyweight contender, don't blink😉, small bucket bag, instantly falling for the fairy-like cream white. Classic quilted stitching + mini double C logo, low-key and classy.· Pull the drawstring to instantly become a "🤩🤩 little lucky bag", full of anti-theft skills.· The chain ⛓️ length can be shoulder, crossbody, or slung casually, friendly for petite frames. Instantly photogenic with a Southern France vacation vibe! This one is on the "heirloom" list, sisters waiting for 25B, go for it! The elegance of the quilted pattern, the embellishment of the gold chain, this black handbag is simply too high-end. Large and small pocket design, practical and stylish, paired with gold metal ring details, texture maxed out~ Light luxury style! 4775 Dimensions: 12.5×10×7cm

items.name_en: 《Black》🔮🔮🔮🚩🚩🚩Calfskin CHANEL 26C Hobo Bag, writing a new definition of elegance with a casual attitude! The perfect blend of soft calfskin and metal chains, interpreting a sense of effortless high-end. In the rules of fashion, the word "wander" has never been so elegant. The Hobo Bag, with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship, redefines the perfect balance between casual and luxury. Design Highlights: Eclectic elegance, made from premium soft leather, presenting a lazy yet structured silhouette. The double chain ⛓️ closure design is the iconic element of this bag; the metal and leather interwoven strap is not only beautiful but also provides a comfortable wearing experience. The spacious interior breaks the stereotype that niche bags are impractical. Whether daily essentials or small items, they can be easily stored. Styling: The perfect companion from casual to formal 👨‍❤️‍💋‍👨, adding points to the overall look. When paired with a dress or little black dress, it adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to the overall look. A conquering item in the fashion world, this bag has become the first choice for many stars and fashion icons. From Zhou Xun, Liu Wen to Chen Weiteng, whether male or female, everyone can carry their own style, proving this design transcends gender boundaries. Dimensions: Length 35CM, Width 14CM, Height 45cm

Retro and gorgeous, exquisite like a work of art. Double-layer accordion shape, large capacity to fit 2 phones 📱, very practical 😄. The double C buckle design is also special, giving a blingbling feeling, so exquisite and cute~ The goat leather is very unique! Feels very durable! Pairs with any outfit to elevate your sophistication. Size: 11*18.5*6cm/

items.name_en: 《Black》Ohanel 25A New Bucket Bag Available|Double Tassels🌟🌟🌟Is this a combination of the wander bag and the frog bag?😼The unique bucket bag style is unforgettable at first sight🫡Bag body made of sheepskin, the gold ring hardware on the back is super cute, the shoulder strap goes through the chain loop. It subverts the traditional backpack type and stands out👍👍Exquisite details everywhere~Cute, classic, and practical, it really hits the spot!!️!!️A must-buy😋 Size: 23x8x25cm

items.name_en: 《Dark Black》🔮🔮🔮OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Vintage Calfskin Custom Leather, super retro in person. My favorite autumn/winter suede Chanel. It's firmly number one in my heart because it's so unique and rare. Chocolate brown with double pockets and a chain strap. This was the first Chanel that attracted me to the brand. It gathers all the suede styles I love. Crossbody tote, adjustable chain ⛓️. These five major elements appear in many similar styles, but this suede brown is the one that hits me the most. The leather looks like cowhide texture but feels like thick matte suede. The chain allows for a shoulder bag style. Lightweight, fits a laptop + iPad! Dimensions: 28x12.5x24cm
